name: Spicy Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 6.25 oz pkgs converted long grain and wild rice mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour hot water into Crock-Pot set to High.
2. Stir in the bouillon cubes.
3. Brown sausage, garlic powder, and cumin in a skillet.
4. Drain the mixture.
5. Add onions and green peppers; sauté until tender (15 to 20 minutes).
6. Transfer the contents to the Crock-Pot.
7. Stir in jalapeno peppers and rice.
8. Cover and cook on High for 1 hour, then turn to Low and cook 1 to 2 more hours.
9. Serve.
Serves 10 to 12.
Note: For a spicier casserole, add the seasoning mix included with the rice.
